corrections.correction: Data Studio Yes/No filters (e.g. Is Deceased): select 'is' radio then use Ant combobox for Yes/No, not clickable text.
Data Studio dynamic filters (City 'is any of'): options are menuitem role, not .ant-select-item-option.
Site Settings search: fill query then press Enter — Ant Design Search onSearch only fires on Enter/search icon, not on fill().
Enable new signup page toggle: use #custom_features__enable_new_signup__enabled and assert ant-switch-checked class; Ant Design 3 switches do not set aria-checked reliably.
Site Settings Save button: scope to .ant-tabs-tabpane-active #site-settings-buttons — each tab duplicates id site-settings-buttons.
Custom Features tab may have NaN in jobs deadline spinbutton blocking Save — fix to 28 before save via getByRole('spinbutton', { name: /Auto hide jobs/i }).
Data Studio search does not add search_text= to URL; verify search input value and first result name instead.
Data Studio pagination: use .ant-pagination-item-2; use findSearchQueryForPagination() with broad search terms.
Data Studio SAVE FILTERS button only visible after filter/column changeState — apply a filter first.
Data Studio saved filter rename/delete: hover .view-item row, then hover .handlebar-icon three-dot; menu hidden until hover. Use non-selected filter via getRenamableSavedFilterName().
Data Studio saved filter list: .views-list-container .view-item, not .view-container.
Giving fillCampaignDates: scope Ant date picker to correct container to avoid strict mode / wrong picker clicks.

productKnowledge.instruction: URL /admin/site-settings; search box placeholder 'Search here ?'; results in #search-tab-results; field keys use double underscores (custom_features__enable_new_signup__enabled).
Enable new signup page toggle is super-admin only; backend key custom_features.enable_new_signup.enabled; affects member signup routing to new builder flow.
TC_SB_001 flow: openSiteSettings → searchSiteSettings('Enable new signup page') → enableNewSignupToggleIfOff → saveSiteSettings if changed → assert ant-switch-checked.
Builder admin URL /admin/signup-builder/; protected steps Basic Information and Preferences; Publish changes button; network waits on signup steps/structure APIs.
Spec: tests/data-studio/data-studio-all.spec.ts; helpers: tests/helpers/data-studio.ts; npm run test:data-studio-all; 59 cases TC_DS_01–59.
Spec: tests/giving/giving-first-70.spec.ts; helpers: tests/helpers/giving.ts; npm run test:giving-first70; cases TC_GV_001–070 from Giving sheet.
Spec: tests/signup-builder/signup-builder-all.spec.ts; helpers: tests/helpers/signup-builder.ts; npm run test:signup-builder-all; cases TC_SB_001–125 from New Sign-up flow builder sheet.
dev-09 base URL https://dev-09.almabase-beta.com; sadmin login path /sadmin; config.json login email/password used by loginAsUser.
Excel source: test-cases/RegressionTest Cases - All Modules.xlsx; serial describe blocks with shared ctx; individual test: npm run test:<script> -- -g 'TC_XXX'.
